questions.question: IRS usually refers to
questions.explanation: In this syllabus IRS = Islamic Religious Studies.

questions.question: Five Pillars of Islam include
questions.explanation: These are the core acts of worship in Islam.

questions.question: Quran is
questions.explanation: The Quran is the central religious text of Islam.

questions.question: Prophet Muhammad is considered
questions.explanation: Muslims regard Muhammad as the final prophet.

questions.question: Hadith are
options: sayings and actions of Prophet Muhammad
questions.explanation: Hadith record the Prophet's sayings and actions.

questions.question: Hajj is required once if
questions.explanation: Hajj obligatory for those who can undertake it.

questions.question: Sharia refers to
questions.explanation: Sharia is the moral and legal framework in Islam.
